blocks.text: Match preview: Indonesia face Thailand in 1st Match (T20) on Mon, 22 Jun, 2026, 11:00 am at Singapore National Cricket Ground Singapore. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Thunderstorm · High 28°C / Low 24°C · Rain: 19.3 mm · Wind: up to 14 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
